identity.name: MetaBuilder
identity.aesthetic: Dark Mode Linear-Style with Electric Purple Accents

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 font-medium px-6 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-600 px-6 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all
buttons.gradient: bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-fuchsia-600 text-white border-0 hover:opacity-90 shadow-lg shadow-violet-500/20 px-6 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all hover:scale-[1.02]

cards.base: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors duration-300
cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-2xl
cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-8 hover:bg-zinc-800/80 transition-all duration-500

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-violet-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-violet-500 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 transition-all outline-none
inputs.chat: bg-zinc-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-zinc-700 focus:border-violet-500/50 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-500 shadow-inner

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6
navigation.sidebar: w-64 h-full border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/90 flex flex-col

tracing_beam.description: A glowing gradient line that traces the border of active cards or sections.
tracing_beam.implementation: Use framer-motion to animate a div along the SVG path of the container border.

noise_texture.css: bg-[url('/noise.png')] opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-[9999] mix-blend-overlay
noise_texture.instruction: Add a subtle noise texture overlay to the entire app to prevent digital flatness.

purple_haze.description: Subtle ambient radial gradients in the background to give depth.
purple_haze.css: absolute top-[-20%] left-[20%] w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-violet-600/20 blur-[120px] rounded-full pointer-events-none

landing_page.hero: Centered high-impact text with 'Build Apps at the Speed of Thought' slogan. Background: Abstract 3D geometric shapes with purple glow.
landing_page.features: Bento Grid (Grid Cols 3). Large 'Live Preview' block (span 2), Small 'AI Chat' block (span 1), Tall 'Code Editor' block (row span 2).
landing_page.testimonials: Horizontal scrolling marquee of user avatars and clean text cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to public/index.html or the main CSS file immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' font families and the custom colors (zinc, violet).

3. SHADCN OVERRIDE: When using Shadcn components, ALWAYS override the default 'border-border' with 'border-zinc-800' and 'bg-background' with 'bg-zinc-950' or 'bg-black' to ensure the dark theme is rich and not washed out.
4. GLASSMORPHISM: Use the 'glass' classes defined in UI components for all floating elements (modals, sticky headers, chat bubbles).
5. NO INTER: Do not use the Inter font. Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body text.
6. USE SONNER: Use the 'sonner' library for all toast notifications. Do not use the default toast.
7. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element (button, input, link) has a data-testid attribute (e.g., 'submit-button', 'email-input').
8. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add 'active:scale-95' to all buttons and 'hover:text-white' to all muted links.
9. ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' for all system icons.
10. BENTO GRIDS: Use 'grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3' with 'row-span-2' classes for feature sections to create the bento look.
11. FILE STRUCTURE: Keep components in 'src/components/ui' but create domain-specific components in 'src/components/dashboard' or 'src/components/builder'.
12. THEME: Default to 'dark'. Add a 'light' toggle, but optimize primarily for dark mode perfection.

universal_guidelines.design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.
anti_patterns: No purple/teal CTAs (Use White/Black for primary actions).
No generic centered layouts (Use asymmetric grids).
No massive full-screen gradients (Use subtle glows).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast is at least 4.5:1. Use lighter text (gray-200) on dark backgrounds, not gray-500.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible violet ring offset by 2px on focus.
